prompt.content:
Using the Q4 2024 information in Ironclad Accrued Expenses Support 123124.xlsx and the attached available historic accrued expenses (Q1&Q2&Q4 2023 and Q2 2024), forecast total accrued expenses in Q4 2025. Use least squared linear regression (OLS). For the time variable, use the actual quarter number where Q1 2023 = 1, Q2 2023 = 2, Q3 2023 =3, etc. 

Do not round intermediate calculations. Round final value to two decimal places. Respond as a message in console.

rubrics.name: States that based on the Q4 2024 information in Ironclad's accrued expenses... (ver_f5f85f2442a14402a58fac5575416070)

messages.content: States that based on the Q4 2024 information in Ironclad's accrued expenses support and the available historic accrued expenses (Q1&Q2&Q4 2023 and Q2 2024), the forecasted total accrued expenses in Q4 2025 is $12,792,263.07 (acceptable range $12,664,340.44 to $12,920,185.70).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Based on the Q4 2024 information in Ironclad's accrued expenses support and the available historic accrued expenses (Q1&Q2&Q4 2023 and Q2 2024), the forecasted total accrued expenses in Q4 2025 is $12,792,263.07.
